prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA839 3.0L V6 TFSI (CZSE/CZSA)** with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (86mm compressor, 62mm turbine) running 28psi on E85, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** and **Bosch Motorsport 0261002047 high-flow injectors** for 600+ WHP. Custom **034 Motorsport billet crankshaft pulley** and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)** with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** to handle boost.

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ VR6/EA839-specific engine mounts** with **Vibra-Technics solid differential mounts** to eliminate drivetrain slop. **AWE Track Edition cat-back exhaust** with **Vibrant 1799 3.5" resonated race delete pipes** and **APR Stage 3+ ECU/TCU tune** (custom dyno-tuned for E85) with **Motec C127 dash logger** for real-time monitoring of AFR, boost, and timing.

**KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (24-way rebound, 12-way compression, adjustable top mounts) with **034 Motorsport sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear)** and **H&R Super Sport Springs** for aggressive stance. **Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston front/355mm 4-piston rear big brake kit** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Atlas-specific, 3-piece overfenders with carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser) paired with **VMR V710 20x10.5" ET25 wheels** (staggered setup, 20x12" rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear)** for maximum grip.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (OEM-style with functional vents) and **VIS Racing carbon fiber roof** to reduce weight. **Morimoto XB LED headlights** with **Lux H8 V4 angel eyes** and **Depo Racing JDM-style side markers** for aggressive lighting. **Custom vinyl wrap in 3M Gloss Flip Psychedelic** with **Oracle Lighting RGB underglow kit** (chassis-mounted, DRL-activated).

**Recaro Sportster CS seats** (VW Atlas-specific bolt-in brackets) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (VW MQB adapter). **Custom rear seat delete with **034 Motorsport aluminum floor plates** and **Vibrant Performance 3" titanium exhaust tips** for a track-ready interior.
